smg.text: Very hot. Mainly fine. Light winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few thundery showers later. Force 2 to 3 north to northwesterly winds, becoming force 4 westerly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional Thundery showers. Force 5 to 6 southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 4 to 5 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 south to southeasterly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 south to southeasterly winds with gusts.
